items.question: What services does LotusFX offer?
items.answer: We offer comprehensive foreign exchange services including: Currency Exchange (18+ currencies), Money Transfer (eWire, Wire Transfer, MoneyGram), Online Money Transfer, Branch Money Transfer, Buy Currency, Cash Passport Platinum Mastercard, and specialized commercial payment solutions for importers and exporters.

items.question: Who can use LotusFX services?
items.answer: We cater to everyone: tourists needing travel currency, local residents sending money abroad, immigrants supporting families overseas, and commercial customers (importers/exporters) making international payments. There are no limits on how much you can exchange or send.

items.question: Is LotusFX regulated and licensed?
items.answer: Yes, LotusFX is fully licensed and regulated by financial authorities in Australia, New Zealand, and Fiji. We comply with all anti-money laundering laws and know-your-customer regulations. Your data is protected and stored securely with regular compliance audits.

items.question: How many branches does LotusFX have?
items.answer: We have 60+ branches across the Pacific: 30+ in Australia, 18+ in New Zealand, and 16+ in Fiji. Plus, we have associates around the world. Find your nearest branch on our locations page.

items.question: What makes LotusFX different from banks?
items.answer: As a niche market player specializing in foreign exchange, we offer: Better rates (2-3% better than banks), No commission on currency exchange, Lower fees, Faster processing, Expert staff trained in currency exchange, and personalized service. We better understand the dynamics of each market and have products tailored to your needs.

items.question: What are your business hours?
items.answer: We're open Monday to Friday, 9am-5pm in your local timezone. Some branches may have extended hours or weekend service. Check our locations page for specific branch hours and holiday schedules.

items.question: How quickly will you respond to my inquiry?
items.answer: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours. Phone calls are answered immediately during business hours. For urgent matters, please call us directly or visit your nearest branch.

items.question: Can I schedule an appointment?
items.answer: Yes, you can schedule an appointment at any of our branches. Call ahead, use our mobile app, or visit in person to book a time that works for you. This is especially helpful for large transactions or complex currency needs.

items.question: Do you offer corporate or business accounts?
items.answer: Yes, we offer specialized services for businesses including importers, exporters, and commercial customers. We provide better rates for high-volume transfers and personalized support. Contact our business team at nzcustomercare@lotusfx.com for more information.

items.question: What documents do I need for transactions?
items.answer: For most transactions, you'll need a valid government-issued ID (passport, national identity card, or driver's license plus bank card) and proof of address (utility bill or bank statement). For larger transactions, additional documentation may be required to comply with regulations.

items.question: Is my personal information secure?
items.answer: Yes, your personal details are stored securely. We comply with all relevant data protection regulations and conduct regular security audits. Your information is protected from unauthorized access with the highest security standards.

items.title: Real-Time Updates
items.description: Our exchange rates are updated every minute during market hours to reflect current market conditions. You always get the most competitive rate available at the time of your transaction.

items.title: No Commission, No Hidden Fees
items.description: What you see is what you pay. We don't add hidden charges or surprise fees. Complete transparency in every transaction. Save money with commission-free currency exchange.

items.title: 2-3% Better Than Banks
items.description: Our rates are typically 2-3% better than major banks. As a niche market player specializing in foreign exchange, we can offer superior rates that banks simply can't match.

items.title: Rate Lock Guarantee
items.description: Pre-order currency and lock in your rate for up to 30 days. Protect yourself from market fluctuations. Pay at the time of order to secure your rate.

items.title: 18+ Currencies Available
items.description: Buy currency in 18 different foreign currencies including USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, NZD, FJD, SGD, HKD, CAD, INR, CNY, THB, MYR, PHP, IDR, VND, and more.

items.title: Instant Quotes & eWire
items.description: Get instant quotes online, via our mobile app, or in-branch. Use eWire for zero-fee transfers between AU, NZ & Fiji. No waiting, no delays, no hidden charges.

testimonials.title: Understanding Exchange Rates
testimonials.subtitle: Learn how our rates work and what they mean

items.text: The rate at which we buy foreign currency from you when you're exchanging foreign currency to local currency. For example, if you're returning from overseas with USD and want NZD.
items.name: Buy Rate

items.text: The rate at which we sell foreign currency to you when you're buying foreign currency from us and paying in local currency. For example, if you need USD for travel and have NZD.
items.name: Sell Rate

items.text: The rate between banks with no margin. Our rates are typically much closer to the mid-market rate than bank rates, meaning you get a better deal with LotusFX.
items.name: Mid-Market Rate

items.question: How often are your rates updated?
items.answer: Our rates are updated every minute during market hours to reflect current market conditions. This ensures you always get the most competitive rate available. Website rates may differ from those displayed in-store and on the Lotus FX Online app due to real-time market movements.

items.question: Can I lock in a rate?
items.answer: Yes! You can pre-order currency and lock in your rate for up to 30 days. Simply select the currency and amount you need, choose a pickup location, and pay at the time of order. This protects you from market fluctuations and gives you peace of mind.

items.question: Why do your rates differ from the mid-market rate?
items.answer: The mid-market rate is the rate between banks with no margin. Our rates include a small margin to cover our operational costs, but this margin is much smaller than banks charge. This is why our rates are typically 2-3% better than bank rates.

items.question: Do you charge fees on top of the exchange rate?
items.answer: No, we don't charge any fees on currency exchange. Our rate includes everything. What you see is what you pay - complete transparency. No commission, no hidden charges, no surprises.

items.question: How do I get the best rate?
items.answer: Pre-order online or through our app to lock in the rate and avoid market fluctuations. Larger amounts may qualify for better rates. Contact our business team at nzcustomercare@lotusfx.com for volume discounts and commercial rates.

items.question: What currencies do you exchange?
items.answer: We exchange 18+ currencies including USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, AUD, NZD, FJD, SGD, HKD, CAD, and many more. Check our website for the complete list of available currencies and current rates.

items.question: Are rates indicative only?
items.answer: Yes, rates are indicative only as they are influenced by market conditions and subject to change. However, once you lock in a rate through pre-order, that rate is guaranteed for your transaction.

items.question: Is there a limit on how much I can exchange?
items.answer: There are no limits on how much currency you can exchange or send. However, for larger transactions, we may require additional information to comply with financial regulations. Contact us for details on large transfers.
